ocr_findings.description: OCR inserts '## アイオーティ' as a section heading before the IoT paragraph; image shows 'IoT' with a small ruby annotation アイオーティ above it inline, not as a standalone section heading. Cosmetic structure difference only.

reviewer_notes: Lesson 04-06 IoTシステム・組込みシステム page. All substantive text about 組込みシステム, IoT definition, ITパスポート exam examples, and IoTサーバ/デバイス composition is faithfully captured. The ruby-text handling as a heading is cosmetic and does not lose any content.
